---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Daedalus
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement

---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Example Usage

If your feature involves a new command, tool, or config option, sketch how it would look:

```
# Example command
daedalus --some-new-flag

# Or in the REPL
/new-command some-arg
```

## Impact

How would this benefit Daedalus users? (e.g. new workflow, performance improvement, ecosystem integration)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
